description: The LegacySlider component was used in old legacy content to act as a UI for adjusting a float via a slider. This component should not be used in new content and should be replaced whenever possible.

fields.IncrementPressed: The Sync delegate to call when the increment button is pressed, passing this component as an argument.
fields.DecrementPressed: The Sync delegate to call when the decrement button is pressed, passing this component as an argument.
fields.DriveField: The float field to drive with ``Value``
fields.AllowWriteBack: Whether changes to the value of the field targeted by ``DriveField`` should be written back to ``Value``.
fields.CreateUndoStep: Whether using this UI creates an Undo step.
fields.Value: The value this component is influencing.
fields.Increment: How much to shift ``Value`` by when using the slider side buttons.
fields.IntegerOnly: Whether ``Value`` can only be a whole number.
fields.SymmetricalField: whether this UI should be symmetrical.
fields.CursorRatioField: the size of the slider cursor compared to the slider container.
fields.SpacingRatioField: How to space out the center UI and its buttons.
fields.TrackRatioField: How big the slider track should be compared to the UI.
fields.ButtonRatioField: How big the buttons should be compared to the slider.
fields._trackMesh: The mesh for the slider track.
fields._leftMesh: The mesh for the left button.
fields._rightMesh: The mesh for the right button.
fields._cursorMesh: The mesh for the slider cursor.
fields._trackMaterial: The material of the slider track.
fields._leftMaterial: The material of the left button.
fields._rightMaterial: The material of the right button.
fields._cursorMaterial: The material of the slider cursor.
fields._leftPosition: The position field of the left button.
fields._rightPosition: The position field of the right button.
fields._cursorPosition: The position field of the cursor.
fields._leftColliderSize: The size field of the left button's collider.
fields._rightColliderSize: The size field of the right button's collider.
fields._trackColliderSize: The size field of the track's collider.
fields._cursorColliderSize: The size field of the cursor's collider.

methods.LeftOnTouch: Called when the left button is touched.
methods.RightOnTouch: Called when the right button is touched.
